articles.author: Sheikh Saaliq, The Associated Press
articles.title: US, Iran spar over status of Iranian warship sunk by submarine - Military Times
articles.description: The United States and Iran have offered sharply different accounts of the sinking of an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean last week.
articles.content: NEW DELHI The United States and Iran have offered sharply different accounts of the sinking of an Iranian warship in the Indian Ocean last week, with Washington rejecting Tehrans claim the vessel was… [+3196 chars]
